input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.8.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.8.6
            TITLE: each attachment point requires backing plates which meet one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.8.6: Each attachment point requires backing plates which meet one of:
F.7.8.6 Each attachment point requires backing plates which meet one of: 
• Steel with a minimum thickness of 2 mm 
• Alternate materials if Equivalency is approved

final_answer: F.7.8.6 Each attachment point requires backing plates which meet one of: • Steel with a minimum thickness of 2 mm • Alternate materials if Equivalency is approved
